---
name: New Site Request
about: Request support for a new anime streaming website
title: '[Site] '
labels: 'enhancement, new-site'
assignees: ''
---

**Site Name**
What is the name of the streaming site? (e.g., Crunchyroll, Aniwave)

**Site URLs**
Please provide the main URL of the site, as well as any known mirror/proxy links.
- Main URL: 
- Alternate URLs: 

**Why should we add it?**
A clear and concise description of why this site should be supported (e.g., it has a massive userbase, it offers 4K streams, it's ad-free).

**Additional context**
Are there any specific quirks about this site? (e.g., Does it require a login? Does it use captchas? Does it host videos in an external iframe?) Add any details that might help with the integration.
